info.title: Apruvly API
info.description:
The Apruvly REST API creates and manages multi-step approval workflows. Notifications go out over Email, Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp (Meta or Twilio), Telegram, Discord, DingTalk, or Twilio SMS — with escalation, lifecycle actions, and credit-based billing.

## Authentication

```
Authorization: Bearer <api-key>
```

API keys are created in the dashboard under **Settings → API Keys**. Each key has one or more scopes; missing scope → `403`.

| Scope | Access |
|-------|--------|
| `api:workflow:read` | Get workflow by id / external_id |
| `api:workflow:write` | Create, validate, approve, reject |
| `api:workflow:list` | Search and recent |
| `api:workflow:cancel` | Cancel workflow |
| `api:settings:read` | Billing + list/get integrations |
| `api:settings:write` | Upsert/delete integrations |
| `api:directory:list` | List areas / people |
| `api:directory:read` | Get area / person by id |
| `api:directory:write` | Create / update area or person |
| `api:directory:bulk` | Bulk create / update |
| `api:directory:delete` | Delete area / person |

`GET /api/v1/health` accepts any authenticated key (no scope).

## Response envelope

```json
{ "success": true, "message": "optional", "data": { } }
```

On errors `success` is `false`. Typed errors may include `data.errorCode` (e.g. `insufficient_credits`, `plan_not_eligible`, `directory_disabled`).

## Rate limits

- **Global:** 100 req/s per IP → `429`
- **Approve/reject:** 10 req/min per IP → `429`
- Plan quotas (concurrent workflows, RPM/RPD/RPC) also return `429` with `quota_type`

## Credits

Creating a workflow debits credits:

- **1 credit per recipient** on each step (and each escalation level); channels without a recipient list (e.g. DingTalk group robot) cost 1 per step
- Step-level `actions` charge separately (1 per webhook / per action recipient)
- **+1 flat surcharge** if any external-delivery action is configured on workflow-level `on` events
- Minimum total: **1 credit**

`POST /api/v1/workflow/validate` checks the payload without charging. Balance: `GET /api/v1/billing`.

## i18n

Error messages follow `Accept-Language` (`en`, `pt-BR`). Default: English.

tags.name: Workflows
tags.description: Create, inspect, search, and cancel workflows.

tags.name: Decisions
tags.description: Approve or reject a pending challenge.

tags.name: Directory
tags.description: Areas and people address book. Paid plans only; must be enabled in the web console at /directory.

get.description: Any authenticated API key. No scope required.

post.description: Starts a workflow and debits credits. Trailing slash (`/api/v1/workflow/`) is accepted.
Same validation as create, without persisting or charging credits.

get.description: Returns the 10 most recent workflows. No query parameters.

put.description: Body shape depends on `{integration}`. Returns `204` with no body.

BearerAuth.description: API key from the Apruvly dashboard.

ErrorResponse.description: Error envelope. For typed errors, `data` is a models.Error object.

message.description: Present on some handlers; typed errors often put the message inside `data.message`.

integration.description: Set on 422 when a required integration is missing.

EmailData.description: Email approval step. Body must include `${approve_link}` and `${reject_link}`. Also supports `${user_email}`, `${user_name}`.

MSTeamsData.description: MS Teams Adaptive Card. Requires ms-teams integration.

SlackData.description: Slack Block Kit DM/channel. Requires slack integration.

WhatsAppData.description: Meta WhatsApp Business Cloud. Requires whatsapp integration.

TelegramData.description: Telegram Bot. Requires telegram integration. `to` = chat IDs (string).

DiscordData.description: Discord Bot DM/channel. Requires discord integration. `to` = snowflake IDs.

DingTalkData.description: DingTalk group robot. Requires dingtalk integration. Optional `to` mobiles for @mentions.

TwilioSMSData.description: Twilio SMS approvals. Requires twilio integration.

TwilioWhatsAppData.description: Twilio WhatsApp channel (distinct from Meta whatsapp). Requires twilio-whatsapp integration.

Escalation.description: Escalate if no decision. Min `after`: 5m. Max depth: 5. Max 10 recipients per level.

data.description: Same shape as the matching step `data`.

Action.description:
Lifecycle / step action. Types: `webhook`, `email`, `twilio-sms`, `twilio-whatsapp`, `whatsapp`, `discord`, `slack`, `ms-teams`, `telegram`, `dingtalk`.

Common shapes:
- webhook: `{ "url", "method", "headers?", "body?", "timeout?", "async?" }`
- email: `{ "to", "subject", "body", ... }`
- slack: `{ "to": ["user@…"| "#channel"], "text" }`
- discord: `{ "channel": "<snowflake>"|"#<snowflake>", "title", "description?" }`

approved.description: Next step id on approval. Empty = workflow approved.

rejected.description: Next step id on rejection. Empty = workflow rejected.

start.description: Id of the first step in `workflow`.

workflow.description: Map of step id → Step. Step ids: `^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]+$`.

on.description: Lifecycle event → actions. Events: workflow_created, workflow_canceled, workflow_approved, workflow_rejected, workflow_expired, workflow_errored, workflow_completed, step_approved, step_escalated, user_approval, user_rejection.

external_id.description: Caller correlation id (Growth+). Unique per account. Pattern: `[A-Za-z0-9._:/-]+`.

disable_email_fallback.description: Opt out of email fallback when a channel notification fails. Default: fallback enabled.

debug.description: Present when the workflow was created with debug=true.

comment.description: Optional comment stored with the decision.

MSTeamsIntegrationConfig.description: Azure Bot Service credentials. Secrets are write-only.

SMTPIntegrationConfig.description: Custom SMTP (Business+). Replaces Apruvly system mail for email steps. `username`/`password` optional depending on the server.

IntegrationStatus.description: GET response. Secrets are never returned — only non-secret identifiers and `has*` boolean flags (e.g. `hasBotToken`, `hasAccessToken`).

PaymentRequired.description: Insufficient credits, plan limit, or feature not on plan

RateLimited.description: Rate limit or plan quota exceeded
